data.title: ‘Clean Cloud Act’ draft bill requires crypto miners to cut emissions or face fines
data.description:
Companies leasing portions of data centers could also be liable for the reporting requirements and emissions fines, according to the draft bill.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/350649/clean-cloud-act-draft-bill-requires-crypto-miners-to-cut-emissions-or-face-fines?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: On-Chain Indicator Suggests Ethereum (ETH) Could Be Undervalued, According to Crypto Analyst
data.description:

source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/12/on-chain-indicator-suggests-ethereum-eth-could-be-undervalued-according-to-crypto-analyst/

data.title:
$BTC Looking pretty good. Held where it should have for now and this weekly is shaping up nicely.

As long as we hold above that 2024 high at ~$74K I think the higher timeframe structure looks just fine.

data.title: Price Of Bitcoin In Recovery As Whale Inflows Register Largest Spike Since February
data.description:
The price of Bitcoin Bitcoin enjoyed some recovery in the second half of the week as bulls finally got a chance to stretch their feet, after almost three weeks of intense sell pressure. Trump’s tariffs severely impacted the price of Bitcoin earlier this month.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/12/price-of-bitcoin-in-recovery-as-whale-inflows-register-largest-spike-since-february/
